Home.subtitle: IT Student (BUT 2) at Paris-Saclay — driven, versatile, and ready to impact.
Home.whyme_0_desc: I apply security reflexes (XSS/SQLi, permissions, hardening) and document my choices — useful in web dev as well as systems/networks.
Home.whyme_1_desc: I can diagnose (Wireshark), automate (scripts), and reason TCP/IP — and I demonstrate it through my network simulator.
Home.whyme_2_desc: Clean, maintainable code, testing/quality when relevant, and readable UX (focus, performance, accessibility).

About.title: About me
About.subtitle: Passionate about software architecture and cybersecurity.
About.p1: Computer science student in BUT 2 (IUT Paris-Saclay), track Deployment of communicating and secure applications, I combine systems/networks and development — through projects like ZeroStrike (LAN multiplayer) and Guess The Like (real-time).
About.p2: I am looking for an <accent>internship from April to July 2026</accent> to strengthen my skills in a professional environment.
About.p3: I am motivated, versatile, and eager to gain new experiences in dynamic environments.

Arsenal.title: Arsenal
Arsenal.subtitle: Technical skills and areas of expertise.
Arsenal.card_sysnet_desc: Computer and network architecture, Linux/Windows administration, system programming. Virtualization, network services, routing, VLAN, firewalls. Wireshark analysis, Marionnet simulation, advanced networks.
Arsenal.card_db_desc: Relational modeling, SQL, database creation and exploitation. SQL integration in a programming language (queries, scripts).
Arsenal.card_dev_desc: Object-oriented programming, GUI, development quality. Web development, software architecture and design, analysis. In BUT: semantic web, Android development, automata and languages.
Arsenal.card_quality_desc: Project and organizational management, IS management. Professional communication, personal development, contract and digital law. Teamwork, rigor, autonomy.
Arsenal.card_cyber_desc: Cryptography and security, system and network security (BUT 2). Firewalls, service hardening, best practices.

Simulator.title: Network Simulator
Simulator.subtitle: Interactive demo — explore the topology and commands.
Simulator.desc_main: Small simulated network: PCs and routers connected by subnets. Click a machine to open its terminal and type commands.
Simulator.desc_goal: Goal: configure interfaces, get an address or set up routing, then test connectivity with ping.
